title: Psedera hirsuta
taxonomy: Psedera hirsuta is a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae. It is native to tropical Asia. The classification of Psedera hirsuta includes its kingdom as Plantae, and its order as Gentianales. Psedera hirsuta is also known to be a member of the genus Psedera. uses: Psedera hirsuta, also known as the hairy toothbrush tree, has been used in traditional medicine for various purposes.
